prestazioni: Engine: S38B36 (3.6L I6) upgraded with a Schrick 284° camshaft kit (intake/exhaust) paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel equal-length exhaust manifold by Supersprint, featuring 4-2-1 merge collectors and ceramic-coated primaries for optimized scavenging and 300+ hp potential on 98 RON fuel.

Forced induction: Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbo (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with a custom cast-aluminum turbo manifold by TurboLab (Germany), mated to a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a custom 3.5" intercooler core by Bell Intercoolers (UK), designed for 1.2 bar boost with a 400 hp target on pump gas (98 RON).

Drivetrain: Getrag 280/5 5-speed manual transmission reinforced with a Quaife ATB differential (45% lock) and a custom 80W-90 GL-5 LSD fluid by Motul Gear 300, paired with a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel (18kg) and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily organic disc for 500+ Nm torque capacity.
estetica: Body: OEM+ Euro-spec E34 M5 Touring rear spoiler (part #51-71-2-226-611) with a custom 3M 2080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap, paired with a genuine BMW M-Technik II front lip (part #51-11-2-226-599) in matching gloss black, and a set of OEM E34 M5 Sport Evolution side skirts (part #51-71-2-226-600) for the rare 3.8L aesthetic.

Wheels: BBS RS-GT II 17x9.5 ET15 (front) and 17x10.5 ET10 (rear) in Gold finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear) with custom spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) by H&R to fill the arches without fender modification.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD Evo II front seats (90s JDM-spec, part #24-11-9-068-599) in Nappa leather with Alcantara centers, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm, suede) and a custom roll cage by Matter Germany (6-point, bolt-in, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) finished in satin black with red leather-wrapped crossbars.
